raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1672 allows ocean lifeguards to provide services at local public swimming pools during staffing shortages.",
    "Nearly every industry has faced staffing shortages due to the pandemic.",
    "Cities are experiencing a shortage of lifeguards at city-run swimming pools and aquatic centers.",
    "The shortage of lifeguards has resulted in a reduction of hours of operation at public pools.",
    "Current law requires lifeguards to have certification from specific organizations, which presents a barrier to staffing.",
    "Ocean lifeguards receive their certification from agencies certified by the United States Lifesaving Association (USLA).",
    "AB 1672 rectifies a technicality in existing law to allow cities to effectively address staffing shortages at public pools.",
    "AB 1672 permits local public agencies to utilize ocean lifeguards to maintain staffing levels at public swimming pools."
  ]
}
```
